text.title: Google Ads Account Foundations Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is conversion tracking live AND ≥30 conv/mo history?

branch.question: Run PMax in addition to Search/Shopping?

conclusion.verdict: Search + Shopping; defer PMax until ≥30 conv/mo

text.example: conv tracking live, 95 conv/mo → Search + Shopping + PMax layered.
